arts.ttl: Spurs close in on £12.5m Czech goalkeeper Kinsky
arts.sum: Tottenham are set to add Slavia Prague goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky to Ange Postecoglou's squad amid an ongoing injury crisis.

arts.ttl: Premier League release statement as Tottenham left fuming over Newcastle decision
arts.sum: Tottenham opened the scoring in the early exchanges against Newcastle, but were quickly pegged back after Anthony Gordon's goal was allowed after major controversy in the build up

arts.ttl: Ange and Joe Hart share Celtic love in as Tottenham boss lets guard down live on air
arts.sum: Postecoglou was reunited with his former Hoops keeper before Spurs' clash with Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Tottenham to complete £12.5m goalkeeper transfer after Guglielmo Vicario 'shock'
arts.sum: Antonin Kinsky is joining Spurs from Slavia Prague in an initial £12.5million deal after a number of high-profile errors from backup stopper Fraser Forster and a nightmare run of results in the absence of No.1 Guglielmo Vicario

arts.ttl: LIVE: Struggling Spurs face fifth-place Newcastle United
arts.sum: Follow for all the live updates from Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: Tottenham agree deal worth £12.5m plus add-ons for Slavia Prague goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky
arts.sum: Tottenham have agreed a £12.5million deal to sign goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky from Slavia Prague. The 21-year-old is due in London on Saturday ahead of having a medical in the evening.

arts.ttl: Spurs v Newcastle team news: Botman returns, illness hits hosts
arts.sum: James Maddison and Son Heung-min are only among the subs The post Spurs v Newcastle team news: Botman returns, illness hits hosts appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Newcastle: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Live updates from the 12.30pm GMT kick-off Why not email Barry with your thoughts An email: “G’day Barry,” writes Chris Paraskevas, who I’m guessing might be in Australia. “The lads and I (three grown men with actual resoonsibilities in life) have tempted fate and assembled to watch the game together. “In the past this has always resulted in disaster. To top things off, we are all wearing a variation of this season’s Newcastle strip. Given Tottenham have had to call up Ledley King at centre-back, surely even our me̶n̶’̶s̶ ̶c̶l̶u̶b̶ supporters club evil eye/curse won’t help Ange tonight.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sven Botman decision made as Newcastle United team sheet lands at Spurs
arts.sum: NEWCASTLE UNITED : Dubravka, Livramento, Botman, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Bruno, Joelinton; Gordon, Murphy, Isak. Botman replaced the suspended Swiss star Fabian Schar who picked up a ban after his booking at Manchester United in the final game of last year.

arts.ttl: Tottenham-Newcastle lineups confirmed as Ange Postecoglou hands debut to 25-year-old
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur goalkeeper Brandon Austin makes his competitive debut for the Lilywhites in their Premier League clash with Newcastle United.
